title: Senior Teacher - Amity University - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Amity University - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amity University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Amity University:
Amity University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University!
